last_assistant_message:
All done. Here is a summary:

**Status: Complete. Commit `82371b8d` on branch `rebrand`.**

**Files modified (4):**

- `packages/coding-agent/src/config.ts` - `piConfig` -> `dgClawConfig`, defaults `"pi"` -> `"dg-claw"` and `".pi"` -> `".dg-claw"`, env vars `PI_PACKAGE_DIR` -> `DG_CLAW_PACKAGE_DIR` and `PI_SHARE_VIEWER_URL` -> `DG_CLAW_SHARE_VIEWER_URL`, GitHub URL updated to `forsonny/DG-Claw`, share viewer URL set to `""`.
- `packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts` - `process.title` set to `"dg-claw"`.
- `packages/coding-agent/src/core/system-prompt.ts` - All product-name "pi" references replaced: identity string, doc section header, packages/topics/md file references.
- `packages/coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/config-selector.ts` - User-facing path labels updated from `~/.pi/agent/` and `.pi/` to `~/.dg-claw/agent/` and `.dg-claw/`.

**Concerns / notes:**

- The `.pi` directory did not exist under `packages/coding-agent/`, so the `mv` step was a no-op. No directory was renamed.
- The root `.gitignore` contains `.pi_config/` (with `_config` suffix), which is a different pattern and was intentionally left unchanged.
- Other `.pi/` occurrences in `src/` (`main.ts`, `migrations.ts`, `sdk.ts`, `skills.ts`, `session-manager.ts`) are in JSDoc comments describing the old upstream behavior. They were left as-is since the task scoped hardcoded path string updates to runnable code, not historical comments.
